nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.id: loc-國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄-ddaff039
nodes.name: 國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄
nodes.summary: 國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联36种鸟类，包括马来山鹧鸪、红腹角雉、Green-billed coucal等36种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 栗麻雀
nodes.summary: 栗麻雀（Chestnut sparrow，学名 Passer eminibey），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于科爾多凡、國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄，常见栖息地包括稀树草原、沼泽。
locations: 國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 科爾多凡
nodes.summary: 科爾多凡是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括栗麻雀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: right|thumb|Male in breeding plumage feeding on scraps of food in Kenya|alt=A small mainly chestnut coloured sparrow with a broad beak feeding on scraps of food placed on a stone slab The chestnut sparrow is found in East Africa in mostly lower country from Darfur through Kordofan, South Sudan, Somalia, Uganda, and Kenya to north-central Tanzania

links.key: bird-栗麻雀-95f8bb1f__distributed_in__loc-國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄-ddaff039
links.target: loc-國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄-ddaff039
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found mostly in dry savanna and in fields and villages, but unlike its relations the golden sparrows, it is sometimes found in swamps of papyrus (certain Cyperus spp.). Its population has not been quantified, but it appears to be common across a very large range and it is assessed by the IUCN Red List as Least Concern for global extinction

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Ranging through the east of Africa from Darfur in Sudan to Tanzania, it is found in dry savanna, papyrus swamps, and near human habitation
